definition: Annual inbound calls normalised by annual patient-month exposure
limitation: Recorded calls are not unique callers or appointments

definition: Mean absolute change between adjacent monthly inbound-call rates
limitation: Measures variation in recorded activity not access quality

definition: Maximum minus minimum monthly inbound-call rate
Answered calls from the waiting-time measure divided by inbound calls
Missed calls divided by inbound calls
limitation: Not a direct measure of unmet clinical need

definition: IVR exits divided by inbound calls
Callback requests divided by inbound calls
